title: Heroes of Avalon (RPG Series)
body:
![Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Heroes_of_Avalon/BH_HA_Header.webp)
![Description](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Heroes_of_Avalon/BH_HA_Desc.webp)
Explore the vast world of "Avalon"! Fight bosses, get awesome loot and more... Craft increasingly powerful weapons and test them in battle! Take heart in the "Avalon" region and good luck!
![Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Heroes_of_Avalon/BH_HA_Features.webp)
                                                              
                                                                  Bosses
                                                                  
                                                             Powerful Weapons

                                                                 RPG style

                                                                   Jobs

                                                                 Skill Tree

                                                                 Spell Trees

                                                                 Dimensions

                                                                  and more!

![Discord](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Heroes_of_Avalon/BH_HA_Discord.webp)
